sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9837" key="a)ntighrotrofe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιγηροτροφέω</orth>, <sense id="n9837.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">support in old age in turn,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0649.tlg001:2:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lesb.Rh.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
